title: Computer Vision Continuous Internal Evaluation (CIE) Process
description: A flowchart illustrating the cyclical process of training, evaluating, and refining a computer vision model for continuous internal assessment.
relationships: Data flows from the dataset through preprocessing to training; the trained model is evaluated, and the results are used to refine the model's architecture or parameters; this improved model is then either deployed or used on new data, creating a feedback loop for continuous improvement.
